title: Skill Marketplace
subtitle: Browse installable agent skills with commercial-use license signals and local install status
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Local skills are still available, but runtime status is unavailable.
gatewayStarting: Gateway is starting. Local skills are available now; runtime status will appear once it is ready.

aiApps.title: AI Apps
aiApps.subtitle: A TaoClaw-style app zone for common AI production tools, with phase one focused on ecommerce product imagery and video generation.

productTitleCandidates.title: Product title candidates
productTitleCandidates.description: Three marketplace-ready title directions with core keywords, audience terms, and usage scenarios.

sellingPointBullets.title: Selling point bullets
sellingPointBullets.description: A five-point benefits list for main images, detail pages, and short product introductions.

detailPageCopyBlock.title: Detail page copy block
detailPageCopyBlock.description: A structured detail-page copy block covering scenario, material, feature, and conversion CTA.

mainImageVariation.title: Main image variation
mainImageVariation.description: A clean product main-image direction with stronger visual focus and platform listing readability.

detailImageSection.title: Detail image section
detailImageSection.description: A detail-page visual module for product features, material, usage scene, and comparison selling points.

longDetailPoster.title: Long detail poster
longDetailPoster.description: A long-form ecommerce poster layout for product detail pages and exhibition presentation material.

videoScriptHook.title: Video script hook
videoScriptHook.description: Opening hook, pain-point line, core selling point, and call to action for product short videos.

productVideoStoryboard.title: Product video storyboard
productVideoStoryboard.description: A product short-video plan with opening shot, feature close-ups, scene demo, and closing call to action.

videoCoverFrame.title: Video cover frame
videoCoverFrame.description: A cover-frame direction for marketplace feeds and short-video first-screen conversion.

empty.category: Apps for this category are being planned

detail.backendDescription: AI apps now call OpenClaw text, image, and video capabilities through host-api. Missing providers are reported clearly; configured providers run production generation jobs.
detail.inlineResult: This result is shown in the card
detail.fileUnavailable: No local file is available yet

workbench.waitingDescription: Fill in the left-side parameters and submit to preview copy, detail images, or video storyboard results here.
workbench.sellingPointsPlaceholder: Example: high waist, slimming fit, quick dry, breathable
workbench.productDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe product benefits, material, scenarios, and constraints
workbench.videoPromptPlaceholder: Example: cinematic look, sunset coast, slow push-in, backlit character.

modelDescriptions.0: Production image generation for main and detail images
modelDescriptions.1: Live image generation for quick previews and style iteration
modelDescriptions.2: 720P product short-video generation for ecommerce scenes

copywriting.title: Ecommerce Copy Generator
copywriting.description: Enter product name, selling points, platform, and audience to generate titles, bullets, detail-page copy, and video scripts.

detailPosterGenerator.title: Detail Image / Poster Generator
detailPosterGenerator.description: Upload product and reference images to generate detail-image modules, long posters, and main-image directions.

shortVideo.title: Product Short Video Generator
shortVideo.description: Use product images, scripts, and scenario prompts to generate short-video scripts, storyboards, and cover-frame directions.

detail.author: Author
detail.apiKeyDesc: The primary API key for this skill. Leave blank if not required or configured elsewhere.
detail.envNote: Note: Rows with empty keys will be automatically removed during save.

sections.title: Contents
sections.empty: This skill has no previewable files.
sections.scanFailed: Failed to scan the skill directory

toast.failedFolderNotFound: Skills folder does not exist yet. Install a skill first.
toast.failedOpenActualFolder: Failed to open actual skill folder
toast.searchTimeoutError: Search timed out, check network. You can also search on ClawHub.ai, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installTimeoutError: Installation timed out, check network. You can also download the ZIP from ClawHub.ai and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.searchRateLimitError: Search rate limit exceeded. You can also search on ClawHub.ai, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installRateLimitError: Installation rate limit exceeded. You can also download the ZIP from ClawHub.ai and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.fetchTimeoutError: Fetching skills timed out, please check your network connection.
toast.fetchRateLimitError: Fetching skills rate limit exceeded, please try again later.
toast.noBatchEnableTargets: All visible skills are already enabled.
toast.noBatchDisableTargets: All visible skills are already disabled.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.localDescription: Installed local skill discovered from your OpenClaw skills directory.
marketplace.localToggleHint: Controls whether this installed skill is available to the runtime.

admin.title: Skill marketplace management
admin.description: Import candidates from GitHub or ClawHub, then review what can be published to the marketplace.
admin.rejectedPreview: Rejected because the license is not approved for commercial marketplace publishing.
admin.selectEmpty: Select a skill to edit its marketplace metadata.
admin.installTargetEmpty: No SKILL.md directory has been discovered yet. Run GitHub preview again to populate install targets.

reviewReady.approved: Skill approved and published when commercial use is allowed.
reviewReady.pending: Skill moved back to pending review.

production-engineering.name: Production Engineering Skills
production-engineering.description: Production-grade engineering workflows for AI coding agents, including quality gates, implementation discipline, and review habits.

awesome-agent-skills.name: Awesome Agent Skills
awesome-agent-skills.description: A large curated directory of cross-agent skills compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and similar tools.

agent-toolkit.name: Agent Toolkit
agent-toolkit.description: A practical collection of skills for development, documentation, planning, automation, and professional workflows.

ai-skills.name: AI Skills
ai-skills.description: Compact behavioral skills for coding assistants, focused on rules, review discipline, and safer agent behavior.

cursor-skills.name: Cursor Skills
cursor-skills.description: Cursor-oriented best-practice skills that can inform IDE workflow, coding standards, and reusable project guidance.

universal-agent-skills.name: Universal Agent Skills
universal-agent-skills.description: Universal self-contained skills for real-world tasks such as writing, research, analysis, and agent collaboration.

marketplace.installDialogSubtitle: Browse Explore by default, or enter keywords to search.
marketplace.securityNote: Click skill card to view its documentation and security information on ClawHub before installation.
marketplace.manualInstallHint: Network issues? You can always download skill ZIP archives from ClawHub.ai and extract them manually into "{{path}}".
marketplace.noResults: No skills found matching your search.
marketplace.emptyPrompt: Search for new skills to expand your capabilities.
marketplace.searchError: ClawHub search failed. Check your connection or installation.
